ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the incident occurred */,
  "cost_2013us_million" REAL /* Cost of the incident in millions of 2013 US dollars */,
  "ines_scale" INTEGER /* International Nuclear Event Scale (INES) rating */,
  "smyth_magnitude" REAL /* Smyth Magnitude of the incident */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the incident occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities resulting from the incident */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident investigation (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., accident, emergency, security breach) */,
  "initial_response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to initiate the first response to the incident */,
  "final_resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to fully resolve the incident */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* List of areas affected by the incident */,
  "public_notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the public was notified about the incident */,
  "public_notification_method" TEXT /* Method used to notify the public (e.g., press release, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the incident occurred */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the incident occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city or area where the incident occurred */,
  "nearest_city" TEXT /* Name of the nearest major city */,
  "distance_to_nearest_city" REAL /* Distance to the nearest major city in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "economic_indicator" REAL /* Economic indicator (e.g., GDP per capita) of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nuclear_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nuclear facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the nuclear facility */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the facility */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the nuclear facility (e.g., power plant, research reactor) */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the facility was commissioned */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date the facility was decommissioned */,
  "safety_rating" REAL /* Safety rating of the facility (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last safety inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled safety inspection */,
  "safety_violations" INTEGER /* Number of safety violations recorded at the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclear_facilities_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclear_facilities_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the operator */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the operator */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the operator was established */,
  "safety_record" TEXT /* Summary of the operator's safety record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_casualties" (
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casualty record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the casualty record belongs to */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries */,
  "evacuations" INTEGER /* Number of evacuations */,
  "injured_requiring_hospitalization" INTEGER /* Number of injured individuals requiring hospitalization */,
  "evacuation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the evacuation process */,
  "long_term_effects" TEXT /* Long-term health effects on casualties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casualty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_casualties_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., report, image, video) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the document (e.g., public, confidential, top secret) */,
  "document_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy searching and categorization */,
  "document_language" TEXT /* Language in which the document is written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_documents_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being investigated */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator conducting the investigation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the investigation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the investigation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations from the investigation */,
  "investigation_cost" REAL /* Cost of the investigation in millions of 2013 US dollars */,
  "investigation_team_size" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in the investigation team */,
  "investigation_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the investigation (e.g., technical, environmental, social) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the investigator */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., nuclear engineering, safety management) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the field */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the investigator (e.g., nuclear engineering, safety management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency response */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the response is for */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of the emergency response (e.g., evacuation, containment) */,
  "initiation_date" TEXT /* Date the emergency response was initiated */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the emergency response was completed */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken during the emergency response */,
  "outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes of the emergency response */,
  "response_cost" REAL /* Cost of the emergency response in millions of 2013 US dollars */,
  "response_team_size" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in the response team */,
  "public_response" TEXT /* Public response to the emergency actions taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_responses_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact assessment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the assessment is for */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the incident */,
  "economic_impact" TEXT /* Economic impact of the incident */,
  "social_impact" TEXT /* Social impact of the incident */,
  "long_term_effects" TEXT /* Long-term effects of the incident */,
  "long_term_economic_impact" TEXT /* Long-term economic impact of the incident */,
  "long_term_social_impact" TEXT /* Long-term social impact of the incident */,
  "recovery_efforts" TEXT /* Efforts made to recover from the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_assessments_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investigator, analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_bodies" (
  "body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory body */,
  "body_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the regulatory body operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the regulatory body */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the regulatory body */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the regulatory body was established */,
  "regulatory_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the regulatory body's jurisdiction (e.g., national, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_regulatory_bodies" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nuclear facility */,
  "body_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulatory body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_regulatory_bodies_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES nuclear_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_regulatory_bodies_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_id") REFERENCES regulatory_bodies ("body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_consequences" (
  "consequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consequence */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the consequence is for */,
  "consequence_type" TEXT /* Type of the consequence (e.g., environmental, economic, social) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the consequence */,
  "financial_impact" REAL /* Financial impact of the consequence in millions of 2013 US dollars */,
  "recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated recovery time for the consequence */,
  "consequence_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the consequence on a scale of 1-10 */,
  "consequence_relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the consequence to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_consequences_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_lessons_learned" (
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lesson learned */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the lesson is derived from */,
  "lesson_description" TEXT /* Description of the lesson learned */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Status of the lesson implementation (e.g., implemented, in progress) */,
  "responsible_party" TEXT /* Responsible party for implementing the lesson */,
  "lesson_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the lesson on future incidents */,
  "lesson_implementation_date" TEXT /* Date the lesson was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lesson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_lessons_learned_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
